ab: tucu a pulavay, vaik a ken katua ku kaka a tjavulung a vavayan a sema akav a kivala tjai kama i Druna.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去屏東拜訪叔叔Druna。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: maka kisiya amen a kemasi Taihuku a sema Akav.
ch: 我們從台北搭火車去屏東。
en: We took the train from Taipei to Taitung.

ab: djemaljum amen i Akav, na unting tua haiya ti kama i Druna a kicacevung tjanuamen.
ch: 到了屏東，叔叔Druna開車來車站接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: inika cemadja a umaq ni kama i Druna tua tisaba, inika cuway i djalan djemaljun anga.
ch: 車站離叔叔Druna家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle’s house, and it’s just a short drive away.

ab: izua za i djemet tua umaq a tjaljiqacaqaca a quma ni kama i Druna, vaik amen a semazua a makapalidring.
ch: 叔叔Druna家附近有個很大的牧場田園，我們一起騎腳踏車到田園。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle’s house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: i tua quma, kacuin amen ni kama i Druna a pakan tua sizi katua gung.
ch: 在田園裡，叔叔Druna帶我們餵羊和餵牛。
en: In the ranch, my uncle Druna took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: ta masulem, kacuin amen a sema lizuk a keman tua kinsa.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: liav aravac a pacacikecikel a sidusiya/haiya i kadjalanan, manasika maka utubai amen a sema zua.
ch: 市區路上汔車來往很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: ta uri vavaik anga men izua, manu cinekav anga nia utubay, saka nia maka basu anga sakamay.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: nacemikel anga men a sema Taihuku tucu, inika ken a kemeljang tui djinumak anga a utubay ni kama i Druna.
ch: 現在我們回到台北了，不知道叔叔Druna的摩托車找到了沒有。
en: Now that we are back in Taipei, I don’t know if my uncle’s motorcycle has been found.
